subject: An update on Prime Video
body:
Dear Prime member, We are writing to you today about an upcoming change to your Prime Video experience. Starting June 17th, 2026, Prime Video movies and TV shows will include limited advertisements. This will allow us to continue investing in compelling content and keep increasing that investment over a long period of time. No action is required from you, and there is no change to the current price of your Prime membership. We will also offer a new ad free option for an additional €1,99 per month* that you can sign up for starting June 17th, 2026. There will be no other changes to your Prime membership. Prime members will continue to enjoy a wide range of shopping, savings, and entertainment benefits: * Unlimited, free delivery on more than nine million items across all categories and more than one million items even on the Same Day. * Exclusive deals and shopping events like Prime Day and Prime Deal Days. * Access to exclusive and broad streaming video content including Prime Original series and movies The Wrecking Crew, Culpa Tuya, The Summer I Turned Pretty, The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, and Young Sherlock and licensed fan favorites Chicago Fire, Chicago PD and Teen Wolf. Also streaming exclusively on Prime Video are popular Dutch titles including Patsers, Nordin, Beauty and the Geek, Good Luck Guys, Lil Kleine: Geen Rem as well as French movies and series like LOL: Qui Rit, Sort!, Squeezie: Merci Internet, Mcwalter, Carjackers and Tout Simplement Fan. * Unlimited full-resolution photo storage and 5GB for video with Amazon Photos. * In-game items for popular titles, claimable games, and a monthly Twitch subscription with Prime Gaming. As always, if you have questions about your Prime membership, you can manage your account here. You can cancel your membership before your next renewal date and receive a pro-rated refund by visiting your account here. Cancellation is effective immediately. Refunds will be processed within 14 days and calculated on a pro-rated basis from the cancellation date through the end of your subscription term. Thank you for being a valued member of Amazon Prime. Sincerely, The Amazon Prime team *Select Prime Video add-on subscriptions and live events, such as sports, will continue to include advertising. Please note: this e-mail was sent from a notification-only address that cannot accept incoming e-mail. Please do not reply to this message.
 
 

Amazon.com.be is a trading name for Amazon EU Sarl, for Amazon Europe Core Sarl and for Amazon Media EU Sarl, all of which have their registered office at 38 avenue John F. Kennedy, L-1855 Luxembourg. ©2026 Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates. Amazon and all related marks are trademarks of Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates.
